narrative.headline: 2020 Nissan Pathfinder: engine and electrical complaints lead a small set of reports
narrative.summary: Owners filed 49 complaints with NHTSA. The biggest cluster is the engine at 14 reports (29%), followed by the electrical system at 10 (20%) and service brakes at 8 (16%). Power train and the forward-collision/automatic-braking system round out the top five. No fires, injuries, or deaths were reported; one forward-collision report was tied to a crash. Watch for check-engine warnings, a backup camera and parking sensors that cut out, and brake noise.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: The most-reported area: 14 complaints (29%). Owners describe the check-engine light coming on intermittently. No crashes, fires, or injuries reported.

issues.sample: We rented this vehicle from Budget for about two weeks. On two separate occasions the backup camera went blank and the rear parking sensors quit working.  I stopped the vehicle and shifted from reverse to drive and back but the rear view camera and sensors did not come back on.
issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: 10 complaints (20%). A common theme is the backup camera going blank and rear parking sensors cutting out. No crashes, fires, or injuries reported.

issues.sample: WHEN I WAS DRIVING IN A PARKING LOT I HEARD A VERY HIGH PITCH NOISE. I PUT MY WINDOW DOWN TO HEAR WHAT IT WAS. THE SOUND WAS VERY CONCERNING ESPECIALLY BECAUSE I HAVE LESS THAN 3K MILES ON MY CAR. I TOOK IT TO THE DEALERSHIP THEY SAID THEY WEREN'T SURE WHY IT WAS MAKING THE NOISE
issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: 8 complaints (16%). Owners report a high-pitched brake noise, sometimes on nearly new vehicles. No crashes, fires, or injuries reported.

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: 7 complaints (14%). Owners describe the vehicle hesitating to accelerate, or accelerating on its own. No crashes, fires, or injuries reported.

issues.title: Forward Collision Avoidance
issues.blurb: 4 complaints (8%). Owners report warning beeps and the ABS light coming on, traced to brake-switch and automatic-braking components. Linked to 1 crash; no injuries.
